title: [MooreToCore][Moore][ImportVerilog] Add basic ops for dynamic string type

features.name: dynamic string variable declaration and assignment
features.description: Code should include a variable of the SystemVerilog dynamic string type, initialized with a string literal and potentially reassigned

features.name: string concatenation using braces
features.description: Code should include a string concatenation expression using the SystemVerilog brace operator on two or more string operands

features.name: string comparison with equality operator
features.description: Code should include a comparison of two string variables using the equality or relational operator and use the boolean result in a conditional

features.name: string to integer conversion via string method
features.description: Code should include a call to the string built-in method that converts a string to an integer value, such as atoi()

features.name: string getc character access method
features.description: Code should include a call to the string built-in method getc(index) to retrieve a single character by index from a string variable

features.name: string toupper and tolower built-in methods
features.description: Code should include calls to the string built-in methods toupper() and tolower() to produce upper-case and lower-case copies of a string

features.name: formatted string creation with $sformat
features.description: Code should include use of $sformat or $sformatf system task to write a formatted string into a string variable, combining integer and string arguments
